scene: Two merchant houses dispute docking rights at the old harbor. Both come to you for backing — each promising loyalty if your voice helps sway the archons their way.

choices.label: Back the harbor guild
choices.resultText: The harbor guild pays promptly and remembers the favor.

choices.label: Throw your weight behind the rival league's claim to Old Port
choices.resultText: Your backing tips a brittle but public settlement; Old Port changes hands.
